## What does this change?

(One paragraph describing the user-visible change.)

## Why?

(The problem this solves. Link to issues if applicable.)

## How was it tested?

- [ ] Existing unit tests still pass (`python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`)
- [ ] New tests added for new behaviour
- [ ] Manual smoke test in the UI (describe what you clicked / queried)
- [ ] CI is green

## Screenshots / logs (if UI or output changes)

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit message uses imperative mood ("Add", "Fix", "Refactor")
- [ ] No fabricated numbers or examples in docs (every concrete claim
      verified against code or data)
- [ ] No personal email / device-specific paths in committed text
- [ ] If introducing a dependency, justified in the PR description
- [ ] If touching docs, the affected file is listed in the PR body
